name: Regina Belle
abstract: Regina Belle (born July 17, 1963) is an American singer-songwriter who started her career in the mid-1980s. Known for her singles "Baby Come to Me" (1989) and "Make It Like It Was" (1990), Belle is most notable for three hit duets, all with Peabo Bryson: "Without You", the love theme from the comedy film Leonard Part 6, recorded in 1987;…

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: She wanted to sing with the band. So she asked me about putting in a word... At the first concert, she did some stuff.
